trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the check has been transmitted.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension PaymentJournal - Control CheckTransmitted - Property ToolTip
Table AppSetup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether an assembly order should be automatically created when a service order is created.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om der automatisk skal oprettes en montageordre, når der oprettes en serviceordre.
trans-unit.note: Table AppSetup - Field Activate Assembly On Service - Property ToolTip
Table AppSetup - Field Activate Assembly On Service - Property Caption
Table AppSetup - Field Primary Key - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default purchase comment code to be used in purchase documents.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den standardkode for købsbemærkninger, der skal bruges i købsbilag.
trans-unit.note: Table AppSetup - Field Purchase Comment Code - Property ToolTip
Table AppSetup - Field Purchase Comment Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default sales comment code to be used in sales documents.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den standard salgsbemærkingskode, der skal bruges i salgsbilag.
trans-unit.note: Table AppSetup - Field Sales Comment Code - Property ToolTip
Table AppSetup - Field Sales Comment Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default service contract order type to be used in service contracts.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den standardordretype, der skal bruges i servicekontrakter.
trans-unit.note: Table AppSetup - Field Standard Contract Order Type - Property ToolTip
Table AppSetup - Field Standard Contract Order Type - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default service order type to be used in service orders.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den standard servicetype, der skal bruges i serviceordrer.
trans-unit.note: Table AppSetup - Field Standard Service Order Type - Property ToolTip
Table AppSetup - Field Standard Service Order Type - Property Caption
Table ReportTextLine - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the language of the text line.
trans-unit.note: Table ReportTextLine - Field Language Code - Property ToolTip
Table ReportTextLine - Field Language Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the line number. This is used to determine the order in which text lines are printed on the report.
trans-unit.target: Angiver linjenummeret. Dette bruges til at bestemme rækkefølgen, i hvilken tekstlinjer udskrives på rapporten.
trans-unit.note: Table ReportTextLine - Field Line No. - Property ToolTip
Table ReportTextLine - Field Line No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the text to be printed on the report.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den tekst, der skal udskrives på rapporten.
trans-unit.note: Table ReportTextLine - Field Line Text - Property ToolTip
Table ReportTextLine - Field Line Text - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the caption of the report this text line is associated with.
trans-unit.target: Angiver overskriften for rapporten denne tekstlinje er knyttet til.
trans-unit.note: Table ReportTextLine - Field Report Caption - Property ToolTip
Table ReportTextLine - Field Report Caption - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the report number this text line is associated with.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det rapportnummer, som denne tekstlinje er knyttet til.
trans-unit.note: Table ReportTextLine - Field Report No. - Property ToolTip
Table ReportTextLine - Field Report No. - Property Caption
Page AppSetup - Property Caption
Page AppSetup - Control General - Property Caption
Page AppSetup - Control Purchase - Property Caption
Page AppSetup - Control Sales - Property Caption
Page AppSetup - Control Service - Property Caption
Page ReportTextLineList - Property Caption
Page ReportTextLineList - Control Filters - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the language code to filter the list on. If left blank, report text lines in all languages will be shown.
trans-unit.target: Angiver sprogkoden, som listen skal filtreres efter. Hvis feltet efterlades tomt, vises rapportens tekstlinjer på alle sprog.
trans-unit.note: Page ReportTextLineList - Control LanguageFilter - Property ToolTip
Page ReportTextLineList - Control LanguageFilter - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the report number to filter the list on. If left blank or set to 0, all report text lines will be shown.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det rapportnummer, som listen skal filtreres efter. Hvis feltet efterlades tomt eller indstilles til 0, vises alle rapporttekstlinjer.
trans-unit.note: Page ReportTextLineList - Control ReportFilter - Property ToolTip
Page ReportTextLineList - Control ReportFilter - Property Caption
Page ReportTextLineList - Control Line Text - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the base unit of measure for the item.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Base Unit of Measure - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Base Unit of Measure - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the item had any sales in the most recent age period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om varen er blevet solgt i den seneste aldersperiode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Had Sales in Period 1 - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Had Sales in Period 1 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the item had any sales in age period 2.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om varen blev solgt i periode 2.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Had Sales in Period 2 - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Had Sales in Period 2 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the item had any sales in age period 3.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om varen blev solgt i aldersperiode 3.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Had Sales in Period 3 - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Had Sales in Period 3 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the item had any sales in the oldest age period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om varen blev solgt i den ældste aldersperiode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Had Sales in Period 4 - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Had Sales in Period 4 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the item has an assembly BOM.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om varen er en montagestykliste.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Has Assembly BOM - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Has Assembly BOM - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the item.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Item Description - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Item Description - Property Caption
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Item No. - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Item No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies when this statistics record was last recalculated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvornår denne statistikpost sidst blev genberegnet.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Last Updated At - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Last Updated At - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the main KTR product group of the item.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Main KTR Product Group - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Main KTR Product Group - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of negative adjustment item ledger entries in the most recent bucket period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af bogføringer for negative justeringsposter i den seneste periode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Neg. Adjustment Count - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Neg. Adjustment Count - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the end date of the most recent age period in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver slutdatoen for den seneste aldersperiode i den sidste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 1 End Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 1 End Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the FIFO-calculated stock quantity originating from the most recent age period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den FIFO-beregnede lagerbeholdning, der stammer fra den seneste aldersperiode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 1 Qty. on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 1 Qty. on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the start date of the most recent age period in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver startdatoen for den seneste aldersperiode i den sidste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 1 Start Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 1 Start Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the FIFO-calculated stock value originating from the most recent age period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den FIFO-beregnede lagerværdi, der stammer fra den seneste aldersperiode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 1 Value on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 1 Value on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the end date of age period 2 in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver slutdatoen for aldersperiode 2 i den seneste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 2 End Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 2 End Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the FIFO-calculated stock quantity originating from age period 2.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den FIFO-beregnede lagerbeholdning, der stammer fra aldersperiode 2.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 2 Qty. on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 2 Qty. on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the start date of age period 2 in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver startdatoen for aldersperiode 2 i den seneste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 2 Start Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 2 Start Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the FIFO-calculated stock value originating from age period 2.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den FIFO-beregnede lagerværdi, der stammer fra aldersperiode 2.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 2 Value on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 2 Value on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the end date of age period 3 in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver slutdatoen for aldersgruppe 3 i den seneste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 3 End Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 3 End Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the FIFO-calculated stock quantity originating from age period 3.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den FIFO-beregnede lagerbeholdning fra aldersperiode 3.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 3 Qty. on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 3 Qty. on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the start date of age period 3 in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver startdatoen for aldersperiode 3 i den seneste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 3 Start Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 3 Start Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the FIFO-calculated stock value originating from age period 3.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den FIFO-beregnede lagerværdi, der stammer fra aldersperiode 3.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 3 Value on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 3 Value on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the end date of the oldest age period in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver slutdatoen for den ældste aldersperiode i den seneste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 4 End Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 4 End Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the FIFO-calculated stock quantity originating from the oldest age period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den FIFO-beregnede lagerbeholdning, der stammer fra den ældste aldersperiode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 4 Qty. on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 4 Qty. on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the start date of the oldest age period in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver startdatoen for den ældste aldersperiode i den seneste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 4 Start Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 4 Start Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the FIFO-calculated stock value originating from the oldest age period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den FIFO-beregnede lagerværdi, der stammer fra den ældste aldersperiode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 4 Value on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period 4 Value on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of age periods that were calculated in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af aldersperioder, der blev beregnet ved den seneste kørsel.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period Count - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Period Count - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of positive adjustment item ledger entries in the most recent bucket period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af positive posteringer i justeringskontoen i den seneste periode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Pos. Adjustment Count - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Pos. Adjustment Count - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the quantity on hand at the end of the previous calendar year.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det disponible antal ved udgangen af det foregående kalenderår.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Prev. Year Qty. on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Prev. Year Qty. on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the inventory value on hand at the end of the previous calendar year.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den aktuelle lagerværdi ved udgangen af det foregående kalenderår.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Prev. Year Value on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Prev. Year Value on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of purchase item ledger entries in the most recent bucket period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af posteringer i købsvarelisten i den seneste periode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Purchase Entry Count - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Purchase Entry Count - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the change in quantity on hand compared to the end of the previous calendar year.
trans-unit.target: Angiver ændringen i lagerbeholdningen i forhold til udgangen af det foregående kalenderår.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Qty. Change vs Prev. Year - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Qty. Change vs Prev. Year - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the reference date used when the statistics were last calculated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den referencedato, der blev anvendt, da statistikken sidst blev beregnet.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Reference Date - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Reference Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of sale item ledger entries in the most recent bucket period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af posteringer i salgsvarelisten i den seneste periode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Sale Entry Count - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Sale Entry Count - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total quantity on hand at the reference date.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det totale antal på lager på referencedatoen.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Total Qty. on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Total Qty. on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total inventory value on hand at the reference date.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den samlede værdi af lagerbeholdningen på referencedatoen.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Total Value on Hand - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Total Value on Hand - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of transfer item ledger entries in the most recent bucket period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af overførselsposter i den seneste periode.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Transfer Entry Count - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Transfer Entry Count - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the change in inventory value compared to the end of the previous calendar year.
trans-unit.target: Angiver ændringen i lagerværdien i forhold til udgangen af det foregående kalenderår.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Value Change vs Prev. Year - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Value Change vs Prev. Year - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of years each age period covers in the last run.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvor mange år hver aldersgruppe dækker i den seneste gennemgang.
trans-unit.note: Table InventoryStatistics - Field Years per Period - Property ToolTip
Table InventoryStatistics - Field Years per Period - Property Caption
Page Inventory Statistics List - Property Caption
Page Inventory Statistics List - Property AdditionalSearchTerms

trans-unit.source: Recalculates inventory age statistics for all items. This may take several minutes.
trans-unit.target: Genberegner statistikken over varernes lagringstid for alle varer. Dette kan tage flere minutter.
trans-unit.note: Page Inventory Statistics List - Action RecalculateStatistics - Property ToolTip
Page Inventory Statistics List - Action RecalculateStatistics - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Open the Job Queue Entry card to schedule the statistics calculation to run automatically, for example every night.
trans-unit.target: Åbn siden Jobkøpost for at indstille, at statistikberegningen skal køre automatisk, f.eks. hver nat.
trans-unit.note: Page Inventory Statistics List - Action SetUpJobQueue - Property ToolTip
Page Inventory Statistics List - Action SetUpJobQueue - Property Caption
Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Property Caption
Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Exclude items unless they have stock in a period older than this value. 0 = no age filter, 1 = must have stock older than 1 period, 2 = older than 2 periods, 3 = oldest period only.
trans-unit.target: Udelad varer, medmindre de har lagerbeholdning fra en periode, der er ældre end denne værdi. 0 = intet aldersfilter, 1 = skal have lagerbeholdning fra en periode, der er ældre end 1 periode, 2 = ældre end 2 perioder, 3 = kun den ældste periode.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control MinAgeField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control MinAgeField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of age periods to calculate (1-4). Period 1 is the most recent.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af aldersperioder, der skal beregnes (1–4). Periode 1 er den seneste.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control PeriodCountField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control PeriodCountField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date to use as reference for calculating stock on hand and age periods. Defaults to the work date.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dato, der skal bruges som reference ved beregning af lagerbeholdning og lageraldersperioder. Standardindstillingen er arbejdsdatoen.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control ReferenceDateField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control ReferenceDateField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: When enabled, items with no balance and no prior-year stock are included. When disabled, such items are removed from the statistics table.
trans-unit.target: Når denne indstilling er aktiveret, medtages poster uden saldo og uden beholdning fra det foregående år. Når indstillingen er deaktiveret, fjernes sådanne poster fra statistiktabellen.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control ShowAllField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control ShowAllField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of years each age period covers. For example, 1 means each period is one year wide.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvor mange år hver aldersgruppe dækker. For eksempel betyder 1, at hver periode dækker et år.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control YearsPerPeriodField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Inventory Statistics - Control YearsPerPeriodField - Property Caption
Codeunit InventoryFunctions - Method BlockNewItem - NamedType NewCreatedItemLbl
Codeunit InventoryFunctions - Method CreateRecordLinkFromComment - NamedType CommentLbl

trans-unit.source: Specifies a mandatory comment for the inventory adjustment, used for audit and approval purposes.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en obligatorisk kommentar til lagerjusteringen, der bruges til revisions- og godkendelsesformål.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AdjustInventory - Control Comment1 - Property ToolTip
PageExtension AdjustInventory - Control Comment1 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a mandatory comment for the inventory adjustment, used for audit and approval purposes.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en obligatorisk kommentar til lagerjusteringen, der bruges til revisions- og godkendelsesformål.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AdjustInventory - Control Comment2 - Property ToolTip
PageExtension AdjustInventory - Control Comment2 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Opens the item ledger entries list with the comment columns visible.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Action ShowComments - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Action ShowComments - Property Caption
PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Action AdjustmentApprovalGroup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Approves the selected warehouse adjustment entry.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Action Approve - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Action Approve - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Opens the approval comment page for the selected warehouse adjustment entry.
trans-unit.target: Åbner siden med godkendelseskommentarer for den valgte lagerjusteringspost.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Action Comment - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Action Comment - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time when the comment was added to the item ledger entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver dato og klokkeslæt for, hvornår bemærkningen blev tilføjet til vareposten.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control CommentCreated - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control CommentCreated - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the user who added the comment to the item ledger entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver id'et for den bruger, der har tilføjet kommentaren til vareposten.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control CommentUserId - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control CommentUserId - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies an internal comment added to the item ledger entry for informational purposes.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en intern bemærking til vareposten.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control EntryComment - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control EntryComment - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date of the last invoice associated with this item ledger entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver datoen for den sidste faktura, der er knyttet til denne varepost.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control LastInvoiceDate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time when the item ledger entry was created.
trans-unit.target: Angiver dato og klokkeslæt for, hvornår vareposten blev oprettet.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control SystemCreatedAt - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the user who created the item ledger entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver id'et for den bruger, der oprettede vareposten.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemLedgerEntries - Control SystemCreatedBy - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the base unit of measure used for the item.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemPlanningFactbox - Control BaseUnitofMeasure - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current inventory quantity of the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den aktuelle lagerbeholdning af varen.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ItemPlanningFactbox - Control Inventory - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Opens the item ledger entries for the selected item, sorted in descending order.
trans-unit.target: Åbner vareposterne for den valgte vare, sorteret i faldende rækkefølge.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension PlanningWorksheet - Action ItemLedgerEntry - Property ToolTip
PageExtension PlanningWorksheet - Action ItemLedgerEntry - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of newly created items that are currently blocked pending approval.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af nyoprettede varer, der i øjeblikket er blokeret i afventning af godkendelse.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ApprovalsActivitiesCue - Field NewlyCreatedItems - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ApprovalsActivitiesCue - Field NewlyCreatedItems - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of warehouse adjustment entries that are pending approval.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af lagerjusteringsposter, der afventer godkendelse.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ApprovalsActivitiesCue - Field WarehouseApprovals - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ApprovalsActivitiesCue - Field WarehouseApprovals - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether newly created items should be automatically blocked until they are approved.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om nyoprettede varer automatisk skal spærres, indtil de er godkendt.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension InventorySetup - Field BlockNewItems - Property ToolTip
TableExtension InventorySetup - Field BlockNewItems - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the minimum cost amount that requires approval before a warehouse adjustment entry can be posted.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det mindste beløb, der kræver godkendelse, før en lagerjustering kan bogføres.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension InventorySetup - Field WhseAdjustmentApprovalLimit - Property ToolTip
TableExtension InventorySetup - Field WhseAdjustmentApprovalLimit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the item is new.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension Item - Field IsNewItem - Property ToolTip
TableExtension Item - Field IsNewItem - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the main KTR-product group for the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den primære KTR-produktgruppe for varen.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension Item - Field MainKTRProductGroup - Property ToolTip
TableExtension Item - Field MainKTRProductGroup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifices a comment on the journal line.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ItemJournalLine - Field Comment - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ItemJournalLine - Field Comment - Property Caption
TableExtension ItemJournalLine - Field ShelfNumber - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ItemJournalLine - Field ShelfNumber - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a comment added when reviewing or approving the warehouse adjustment entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en bemærkning, der vises ved gennemgang eller godkendelse af lagerreguleringen.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ItemLedgerEntry - Field ApprovalComment - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ItemLedgerEntry - Field ApprovalComment - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current approval status of the warehouse adjustment entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den aktuelle godkendelsesstatus for lagerjusteringsposten.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ItemLedgerEntry - Field ApprovalStatus - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ItemLedgerEntry - Field ApprovalStatus - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time when the warehouse adjustment entry was approved.
trans-unit.target: Angiver dato og klokkeslæt for, hvornår lagerjusteringsposten blev godkendt.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ItemLedgerEntry - Field ApprovedAt - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ItemLedgerEntry - Field ApprovedAt - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the user who approved the warehouse adjustment entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den bruger, der har godkendt lagerjusteringen.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ItemLedgerEntry - Field ApprovedBy - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ItemLedgerEntry - Field ApprovedBy - Property Caption
Enum LedgerApprovalStatus - EnumValue Approved - Property Caption
Enum LedgerApprovalStatus - EnumValue Pending Approval - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the resource is used for freight.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om ressourcen anvendes til fragt.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension Resource - Field Freight - Property ToolTip
TableExtension Resource - Field Freight - Property Caption
Table VendorFeeLimit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the amount limit for vendor fees.
trans-unit.note: Table VendorFeeLimit - Field Amount Limit - Property ToolTip
Table VendorFeeLimit - Field Amount Limit - Property Caption
Table VendorFeeLimit - Field Currency Code - Property ToolTip
Table VendorFeeLimit - Field Currency Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the fee amount for the vendor.
trans-unit.note: Table VendorFeeLimit - Field Fee Amount - Property ToolTip
Table VendorFeeLimit - Field Fee Amount - Property Caption
Table VendorFeeLimit - Field Vendor No. - Property ToolTip
Table VendorFeeLimit - Field Vendor No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Vendor %1 (%2) has a fee on %3 for purchases below %4 %5.
trans-unit.target: Kreditor %1 (%2) opkræver et gebyr på %3 på køb under %4 %5.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Vendor No., %2 = Vendor Name, %3 = Fee Amount, %4 = Amount Limit, %5 = Currency Code
Codeunit PurchasesFunctions - Method CheckVendorFeeLimit - NamedType VendorFeeNotificationMsg
Page VendorFeeLimitList - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date you expect the items to be available in your warehouse. If you leave the field blank, it will be calculated as follows: Planned Receipt Date + Safety Lead Time + Inbound Warehouse Handling Time = Expected Receipt Date.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dato, hvor du forventer, at varerne er tilgængelige på lageret. Hvis du lader feltet være tomt, bliver det beregnet på følgende måde: Planlagt modtagelsesdato + Sikkerhedstid + Indgående lagerekspeditionstid = Forventet modtagelsesdato.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension PurchaseOrderList - Control ExpectedReceiptDate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date that the vendor has promised to deliver the order.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dato, som kreditoren har lovet at levere ordren.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension PurchaseOrderList - Control PromisedReceiptDate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: View and manage the fee limits associated with this vendor.
trans-unit.target: Se og administrer de gebyrgrænser, der er knyttet til denne leverandør.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension VendorCard - Action VendorFees - Property ToolTip
PageExtension VendorCard - Action VendorFees - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the shelf number where the item is stored, retrieved from the item record.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det placeringsnummer, hvor varen opbevares, hentet fra varekortet.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension PurchaseLine - Field ShelfNumber - Property ToolTip
TableExtension PurchaseLine - Field ShelfNumber - Property Caption
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the base unit of measure for the item.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Base Unit of Measure - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Base Unit of Measure - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the calculated cost of item-type BOM components based on invoiced quantity.
trans-unit.target: Angiver de beregnede omkostninger for komponenter i styklisten af typen Vare baseret på den fakturerede mængde.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field BOM Item Cost - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field BOM Item Cost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the calculated cost of non-time resource BOM components based on invoiced quantity.
trans-unit.target: Angiver de beregnede omkostninger for BOM-komponenter, der ikke er tidsbaserede, baseret på den fakturerede mængde.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field BOM Resource Item Cost - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field BOM Resource Item Cost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total time-based resource quantity from BOM components based on invoiced quantity.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den samlede tidsbaserede ressourcemængde fra styklistekomponenterne baseret på den fakturerede mængde.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field BOM Resource Time - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field BOM Resource Time - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total actual cost amount for the customer/item in the period. Negative values represent cost of goods sold.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det samlede faktiske omkostningsbeløb for kunden/varen i perioden. Negative værdier angiver vareforbrug.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Cost Amount - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Cost Amount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the costing method of the item.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Costing Method - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Costing Method - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the customer at the time of calculation.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Customer Name - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Customer Name - Property Caption
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Customer No. - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Customer No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the dimension value used to group this record. An empty value means no dimension filter was applied.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dimensionsværdi, der bruges til at gruppere denne post. En tom værdi betyder, at der ikke er anvendt noget dimensionsfilter.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Dimension Value Code - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Dimension Value Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total discount amount for the customer/item in the period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det samlede rabatbeløb for kunden/varen i perioden.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Discount Amount - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Discount Amount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the dimension code that was used to group rows when this snapshot was calculated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dimensionskode, der blev brugt til at gruppere rækker, da dette øjebliksbillede blev beregnet.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Filter Dimension Code - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Filter Dimension Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the item has an assembly BOM.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om varen har en montagestykliste.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Has Assembly BOM - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Has Assembly BOM - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total invoiced quantity sold to the customer for the item in the period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den samlede fakturerede mængde, der er solgt til kunden for varen i perioden.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Invoiced Quantity - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Invoiced Quantity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the item at the time of calculation.
trans-unit.target: Angiver beskrivelsen af varen på beregningstidspunktet.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Item Description - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Item Description - Property Caption
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Item No. - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Item No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the main KTR product group of the item.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Main KTR Product Group - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Main KTR Product Group - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total non-inventoriable cost amount (e.g. item charges) for the customer/item in the period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det samlede beløb for ikke-lagerførte omkostninger (f.eks. vareomkostninger) for kunden/varen i perioden.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Non-Invtbl. Cost Amount - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Non-Invtbl. Cost Amount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the end of the posting date range used when calculating this record.
trans-unit.target: Angiver slutningen af det datointerval, der anvendes ved beregningen af denne post.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Period End Date - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Period End Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the start of the posting date range used when calculating this record.
trans-unit.target: Angiver startdatoen for det datointerval, der anvendes ved beregningen af denne post.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Period Start Date - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Period Start Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the gross profit (Sales Amount + Cost Amount + Non-Inventoriable Cost Amount).
trans-unit.target: Angiver bruttoresultatet (salgsbeløb + omkostningsbeløb + omkostninger til ikke-lagerførte varer).
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Profit - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Profit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the gross profit as a percentage of the sales amount.
trans-unit.target: Angiver bruttoresultatet som en procentdel af omsætningen.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Profit % - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Profit % - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date on which this statistics snapshot was generated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dato, hvor dette statistiske øjebliksbillede blev genereret.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Run Date - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Run Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total sales amount (actual) for the customer/item in the period.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det samlede salgsbeløb (faktisk) for kunden/varen i perioden.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Sales Amount - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Sales Amount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the salesperson code from the value entry.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Salesperson Code - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Salesperson Code - Property Caption
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Vendor Item No. - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Vendor Item No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the preferred vendor.
trans-unit.target: Angiver navnet på den foretrukne leverandør.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Vendor Name - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Vendor Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the preferred vendor of the item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den foretrukne leverandør af varen.
trans-unit.note: Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Vendor No. - Property ToolTip
Table CustomerItemSalesStats - Field Vendor No. - Property Caption
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total cost amount from the resource ledger entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det samlede beløb fra posteringen i ressourceposten.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Cost Amount - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Cost Amount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the customer.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Customer Name - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Customer Name - Property Caption
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Customer No. - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Customer No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the dimension value used to group this record.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dimensionsværdi, der bruges til at gruppere denne post.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Dimension Value Code - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Dimension Value Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the document number from the resource ledger entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver dokumentnummeret fra oplysningerne i ressourcebogen.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Document No. - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Document No. - Property Caption
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Document Type - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Document Type - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique entry number assigned automatically.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det unikke løbenummer, der tildeles automatisk.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Entry No. - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Entry No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the dimension code that was used to group rows when this snapshot was calculated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dimensionskode, der blev brugt til at gruppere rækker, da dette øjebliksbillede blev beregnet.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Filter Dimension Code - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Filter Dimension Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the posting date end filter that was active when this snapshot was calculated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det filter for slutdato for bogføringer, der var aktivt, da dette øjebliksbillede blev beregnet.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Filter Posting Date End - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Filter Posting Date End - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the posting date start filter that was active when this snapshot was calculated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det startfilter for bogføringsdato, der var aktivt, da dette øjebliksbillede blev beregnet.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Filter Posting Date Start - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Filter Posting Date Start - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the posting date of the resource ledger entry.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Posting Date - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Posting Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the gross profit (Sales Amount - Cost Amount).
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Profit - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Profit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the gross profit as a percentage of the sales amount.
trans-unit.target: Angiver bruttoresultatet som en procentdel af omsætningen.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Profit % - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Profit % - Property Caption
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Quantity - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Quantity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the resource.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Resource Name - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Resource Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.target: Angiver nummeret på den ressource, der har foretaget registreringen.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Resource No. - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Resource No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date on which this statistics snapshot was generated.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dato, hvor dette statistiske øjebliksbillede blev genereret.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Run Date - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Run Date - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total sales price (positive = revenue).
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Sales Amount - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Sales Amount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the salesperson code from the customer.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Salesperson Code - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Salesperson Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unit of measure code from the resource ledger entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver måleenhedskoden fra posteringen i ressourcehovedbogen.
trans-unit.note: Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Unit of Measure Code - Property ToolTip
Table CustResourceSalesStats - Field Unit of Measure Code - Property Caption
Page Customer Item Sales Stats List - Property Caption
Page Customer Item Sales Stats List - Property AdditionalSearchTerms

trans-unit.source: Recalculates Customer/Item Sales Statistics for all customers using the date range configured in FTU Setup. This may take several minutes.
trans-unit.target: Genberegner salgsstatistikker for kunder og varer for alle kunder ved hjælp af det datointerval, der er angivet i FTU-opsætningen. Dette kan tage flere minutter.
trans-unit.note: Page Customer Item Sales Stats List - Action RecalculateStatistics - Property ToolTip
Page Customer Item Sales Stats List - Action RecalculateStatistics - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Open the Job Queue Entry card to schedule the statistics calculation to run automatically, for example every night.
trans-unit.target: Åbn siden Jobkøpost for at indstille, at statistikberegningen skal køre automatisk, f.eks. hver nat.
trans-unit.note: Page Customer Item Sales Stats List - Action SetUpJobQueue - Property ToolTip
Page Customer Item Sales Stats List - Action SetUpJobQueue - Property Caption
Page CustResourceSalesStatsList - Property Caption
Page CustResourceSalesStatsList - Property AdditionalSearchTerms

trans-unit.source: Recalculates Customer/Resource Sales Statistics. This may take several minutes.
trans-unit.target: Genberegner salgsstatistikker for kunder/ressourcer. Dette kan tage et par minutter.
trans-unit.note: Page CustResourceSalesStatsList - Action RecalculateStatistics - Property ToolTip
Page CustResourceSalesStatsList - Action RecalculateStatistics - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Open the Job Queue Entry card to schedule the statistics calculation to run automatically.
trans-unit.target: Åbn jobkøposten for at indstille, at statistikberegningen skal køre automatisk.
trans-unit.note: Page CustResourceSalesStatsList - Action SetUpJobQueue - Property ToolTip
Page CustResourceSalesStatsList - Action SetUpJobQueue - Property Caption
Report Calc. Cust./Item Sales Stats - Property Caption
Report Calc. Cust./Item Sales Stats - Control Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the dimension code used to group rows, for example AFDELING. Leave empty to skip dimension grouping.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dimensionskode, der bruges til at gruppere rækker, f.eks. AFDELING. Lad feltet være tomt for at springe dimensionsgrupperingen over.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Cust./Item Sales Stats - Control DimensionCodeField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Cust./Item Sales Stats - Control DimensionCodeField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the end of the posting date range to include. Leave empty together with Start Date to include all dates.
trans-unit.target: Angiver slutdatoen for det datointerval, der skal medtages. Lad feltet stå tomt sammen med startdatoen for at medtage alle datoer.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Cust./Item Sales Stats - Control PostingDateEndField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Cust./Item Sales Stats - Control PostingDateEndField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the start of the posting date range to include. Leave empty to include all dates up to the end date.
trans-unit.target: Angiver startdatoen for det datointerval, der skal medtages. Lad feltet være tomt for at medtage alle datoer frem til slutdatoen.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Cust./Item Sales Stats - Control PostingDateStartField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Cust./Item Sales Stats - Control PostingDateStartField - Property Caption
Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - Property Caption
Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - NamedType InvoiceLbl
Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - Control Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the dimension code used to group rows, for example AFDELING. Leave empty to skip dimension grouping.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dimensionskode, der bruges til at gruppere rækker, f.eks. AFDELING. Lad feltet være tomt for at springe dimensionsgrupperingen over.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - Control DimensionCodeField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - Control DimensionCodeField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the end of the posting date range to include.
trans-unit.target: Angiver slutdatoen for det datointerval, der skal medtages.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - Control PostingDateEndField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - Control PostingDateEndField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the start of the posting date range to include.
trans-unit.target: Bogføringsdatoen er ikke inden for intervallet af tilladte bogføringsdatoer.
trans-unit.note: Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - Control PostingDateStartField - Property ToolTip
Report Calc. Cust./Res. Sales Stats - Control PostingDateStartField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: There is no freight on this document. Continue?
trans-unit.target: Der er ingen fragt på dette bilag. Vil du fortsætte?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit SalesFunctions - Method CheckFreight - NamedType NoFreightQst

trans-unit.source: Specifies the assigned posting number for the sales order.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det tildelte bogføringsnummer for salgsordren.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension SalesOrder - Control PostingNo - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the shelf number where the item is stored, retrieved from the item record.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det placeringsnummer, hvor varen opbevares, hentet fra varekortet.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension SalesLine - Field ShelfNumber - Property ToolTip
TableExtension SalesLine - Field ShelfNumber - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether documents are sorted in descending order for this user.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om bilagene skal sorteres i faldende rækkefølge for denne bruger.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension UserSetup - Field SortDocumentsDescending - Property ToolTip
TableExtension UserSetup - Field SortDocumentsDescending - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether this user is authorized to approve warehouse adjustment entries.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, om denne bruger har tilladelse til at godkende lagerjusteringer.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension UserSetup - Field WhseAdjustmentApprover - Property ToolTip
TableExtension UserSetup - Field WhseAdjustmentApprover - Property Caption
PermissionSet AppAdmins - Property Caption
PermissionSet AppAllUsers - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: There is not enough assembled on assembly order %1 to cover the need on service order %2 line %3.
trans-unit.target: Der er ikke samlet nok på montageordre %1 til at dække behovet på serviceordre %2 linje %3.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Assembly Order No., %2 = Service Order No., %3 = Service Line No.
Codeunit ATOServiceEventHandler - Method CheckAssembly_OnBeforePostWithLines - NamedType InsufficientAssembledErr
PageExtension ATOLines - Action ShowOrder - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ATOLines - Action ShowOrder - Property Caption

PageExtension ATOPstdServInvSubform - Action ViewAssemblyOrder - Property Caption

TableExtension ATOServiceCrMemoLine - Field QuantityToAssemble - Property Caption
TableExtension ATOServiceInvoiceLine - Field AssemblyOrderNumber - Property Caption
TableExtension ATOServiceInvoiceLine - Field QuantityToAssemble - Property Caption
TableExtension ATOServiceLine - Field AssemblyOrderNumber - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ATOServiceLine - Field AssemblyOrderNumber - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the quantity that needs to be assembled.
trans-unit.target: Angiver det antal der skal monteres.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ATOServiceLine - Field QuantityToAssemble - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ATOServiceLine - Field QuantityToAssemble - Property Caption
%1 = Field Caption; %2 = Quantity; %3 = Unit of Measure
TableExtension ATOServiceLine - Field QuantityToAssemble - Method OnValidate - NamedType QtyExceedDemandErr
TableExtension ATOServiceShipmentItemLine - Field AssemblyOrderNumber - Property Caption
TableExtension ATOServiceShipmentItemLine - Field QuantityToAssemble - Property Caption
TableExtension ServiceHeader - Field LineAmountTotal - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The %1 %2 is different from today.\\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: %1 %2 er anderledes end i dag.\\Vil du fortsætte?
trans-unit.note: %1 = Field Caption, %2 = Posting Date
Codeunit ServiceEventHandler - Method CheckPostingDate_OnBeforePostWithLines - NamedType WrongPostingDateQst

trans-unit.source: %1 %2 is associated with %3 %4.\\Do you want to move the contract to the next period?
trans-unit.target: %1 %2 er knyttet til %3 %4.\\Vil du flytte kontrakten til næste periode?
trans-unit.note: %1 = Document Type, %2 = Document No., %3 = Contract Type, %4 = Contract No.
Codeunit ServiceFunctions - Method MoveNextPlannedServiceDate - NamedType UpdateNextPlanningDateQst

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of service order lines associated with this service item.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af serviceordrelinjer, der er knyttet til denne servicevare.
trans-unit.note: TableExtension ServiceItem - Field ServiceOrderLines - Property ToolTip
TableExtension ServiceItem - Field ServiceOrderLines - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of service quote lines associated with this service item.

TableExtension ServiceItem - Field ServiceQuoteLines - Property Caption

Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Property Caption
Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control CommentGroup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a comment provided when approving or rejecting the warehouse adjustment entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en bemærkning for lagerjusteringens godkendelse eller afvisning.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Approval Comment - Property ToolTip
Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control InfoGroup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current approval status of the warehouse adjustment entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den aktuelle godkendelsesstatus for lagerjusteringsposten.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Approval Status - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time when the warehouse adjustment entry was approved.
trans-unit.target: Angiver dato og klokkeslæt for, hvornår lagerjusteringsposten blev godkendt.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Approved At - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the user who approved the warehouse adjustment entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den bruger, der har godkendt lagerjusteringen.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Approved By - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the adjusted actual cost, in local currency, of the quantity posting.
trans-unit.target: Angiver de justerede faktiske omkostninger i regnskabsvaluta for mængdebogføringen.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Cost Amount (Actual) - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a description of the item or the entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver en beskrivelse af varen eller posten.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.
trans-unit.target: Angiver nummeret på posten, som tildeles fra den angivne nummerserie, da posten blev oprettet.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Entry No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies which type of transaction the entry was created from, such as a purchase, sale, or positive adjustment.
trans-unit.target: Angiver, hvilken type transaktion posteringen stammer fra, f.eks. et køb, et salg eller en positiv korrektion.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Entry Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the item number associated with this item ledger entry.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Item No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date when the entry was posted.
trans-unit.target: Angiver den dato, hvor posten blev bogført.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Posting Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of units of the item recorded in this entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver antallet af enheder af den vare, der er registreret i denne post.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time when the entry was created.
trans-unit.target: Angiver dato og klokkeslæt for, hvornår posten blev oprettet.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control SystemCreatedAt - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the user who created the entry.
trans-unit.target: Angiver id'et for den bruger, der oprettede posten.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Control SystemCreatedBy - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Approves the warehouse adjustment entry, allowing the inventory change to be posted.
trans-unit.target: Godkender lagerjusteringsposten, så lagerbeholdningsændringen kan bogføres.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Action Approve - Property ToolTip
Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Action Approve - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Reverts the approval of the warehouse adjustment entry, setting it back to pending status.
trans-unit.target: Annullerer godkendelsen af lagerjusteringsposten og sætter den tilbage til status afventer.
trans-unit.note: Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Action UndoApprove - Property ToolTip
Page WarehouseRegAppComment - Action UndoApprove - Property Caption
